assertions.description: power_regulators correctly identifies U1=TPS631000DRLR as switching, with inductor L1, input_rail=V_in, output_rail=V_out, and fb_net=FB.
R1=91k, R2=511k, R3=806k form output feedback dividers for the TPS631000. voltage_dividers is empty. These are standard switching regulator feedback networks.
